'''kanoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadenness|leadenness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadenness|leadenness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kanoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæneteth|kæneteth]] || [[word:kænetej|kænetej]] || [[word:kænetesh|kænetesh]] || [[word:kænete|kænete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kanonototh|kanonototh]] || [[word:kanonotoj|kanonotoj]] || [[word:kanonotosh|kanonotosh]] || [[word:kanonoto|kanonoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kanototh|kanototh]] || [[word:kanotoj|kanotoj]] || [[word:kanotosh|kanotosh]] || [[word:kanoto|kanoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kanoftoth|kanoftoth]] || [[word:kanoftoj|kanoftoj]] || [[word:kanoftosh|kanoftosh]] || [[word:kanoftof|kanoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kanototho|kanototho]] || [[word:kanotojo|kanotojo]] || [[word:kanotosho|kanotosho]] || [[word:kanotoko|kanotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kanototh|kanototh]] || [[word:kanotoj|kanotoj]] || [[word:kanotosh|kanotosh]] || [[word:kanoto|kanoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kanotothol|kanotothol]] || [[word:kanotojol|kanotojol]] || [[word:kanotoshol|kanotoshol]] || [[word:kanotokol|kanotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kanotothotho|kanotothotho]] || [[word:kanotojojo|kanotojojo]] || [[word:kanotoshosho|kanotoshosho]] || [[word:kanotoko|kanotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kanotothon|kanotothon]] || [[word:kanotojon|kanotojon]] || [[word:kanotoshon|kanotoshon]] || [[word:kanotokon|kanotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kanotothoro|kanotothoro]] || [[word:kanotojoro|kanotojoro]] || [[word:kanotoshoro|kanotoshoro]] || [[word:kanotokoro|kanotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
